title: tournesol plicata
intro: Tournesol plicata, also known as sunflower helenium or sneezeweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Tournesol plicata include reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs. Tournesol plicata can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
